# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

This project should be a practical, respectful place to collaborate. Expected behavior includes:

- using clear and constructive language,
- accepting technical disagreement without personal attacks,
- respecting different experience levels and backgrounds,
- focusing criticism on code, design, documentation, or process rather than people.

Unacceptable behavior includes harassment, threats, discriminatory language, sustained disruption,
or publishing private information without permission.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove comments, close issues, reject contributions, or restrict access for
behavior that violates these standards.

If you need to report a concern, contact the maintainer privately when possible. Include relevant
links, screenshots, or context so the issue can be reviewed fairly.
